archive_data.question_text: Which of the following was opened by Gour Mohan Addy in 1829?

explanation.english: Gour Mohan Addy established the Oriental Seminary in 1829. It was one of the earliest private educational institutions in Calcutta during the British period.
explanation.tanglish: Gour Mohan Addy 1829 varudathil Oriental Seminary ai arambithaar. Idhu British kaalathile Calcutta vil oru adhyapaka utpatta idam.

archive_data.question_text: In which pair of states is Holi also celebrated as Dola Purnima?

explanation.english: Dola Purnima is another name for Holi festival celebrated in West Bengal and Odisha, where devotees worship Lord Krishna and Radha on decorated swings.
explanation.tanglish: Dola Purnima endru periyadhu West Bengal matrum Odishaavil Holi pandigaiyaaga kondadapadum. Ithil bakthargal Krishna matrum Radhai alangarikka pattadhu oonjalil valipireergal.

archive_data.question_text: Which political party was in power when Sardar Swaran Singh Committee made recommendations about Fundamental Duties?

explanation.english: The Sardar Swaran Singh Committee was appointed in 1976 by the Indian National Congress government headed by Indira Gandhi to recommend Fundamental Duties for the Constitution.
explanation.tanglish: Sardar Swaran Singh Committee 1976 il Indira Gandhi thalaimaiyilana Congress arasalin kaalathil Constitution il Fundamental Duties serthidave recommend seya utpattadhu.

archive_data.question_text: Which Article of the Indian Constitution is related with promotion of co-operative societies?

explanation.english: Article 43B was inserted by the 97th Constitutional Amendment Act of 2011 to promote co-operative societies and ensure their democratic functioning.
explanation.tanglish: Article 43B 2011 il varintra 97th Constitution Thirutham Seithigal Moolama co-operative societies valarpithal matrum aathidhika muraiyil nadathu paduthalukaka serthapattadhu.

archive_data.question_text: The Indian government launched the 'Garib Kalyan Rojgar Abhiyaan' ('GKRA') on 20th June 2020 to provide work for how many days?

explanation.english: Garib Kalyan Rojgar Abhiyaan was launched on 20 June 2020 to provide 125 days of employment to migrant workers who returned to villages during COVID-19 lockdown.
explanation.tanglish: Garib Kalyan Rojgar Abhiyaan 20 June 2020 il COVID-19 lockdown samayathu oorukku thirumbiya thoorathozhilalarku 125 naatkal velai kidaikka aarambikkappattadhu.

archive_data.question_text: In 2016, Yamini Krishnamurthy received the Padma Vibhushan for her contribution to which fields of classical dance?

explanation.english: Yamini Krishnamurthy received the Padma Vibhushan in 2016 for her exceptional contributions to Bharatanatyam and Kuchipudi classical dance forms.
explanation.tanglish: Yamini Krishnamurthy Bharatanatyam matrum Kuchipudi aadumuraiyil seitha mika mukkiyamana thodarbanathukaka 2016 il Padma Vibhushan parisu petradhu.

archive_data.question_text: शतरंज में उपयोग होने वाले सफेद हाथियों (rooks) की संख्या ________ होती है।

explanation.english: In a game of chess, there are two white rooks (also called castles) placed at the corners of the board at the start of the game.
explanation.tanglish: Chess vilayattil adhihaga irandu vellai rooks (kottai endrum sollalam) vilayattu aarambathil boardin marthaangalil veikkappattuladhu.
